description: Create a 3-circle Venn diagram in EdrawMax comparing cloud service models with the title 'Cloud Service Models Comparison'. Label the three main circles 'IaaS', 'PaaS', and 'SaaS'. Include 'Virtual Machines' in the IaaS unique region, 'App Engine' in the PaaS unique region, and 'Office Suite' in the SaaS unique region. Place 'Scalability' in the center region where all three circles overlap. Ensure the circles use transparent fill colors so all overlaps are visible. Save the final diagram to /home/ga/Documents/cloud_services_venn.eddx.
